message:
fix: handle json.Number in Gemini parseUsage for streaming

The streaming SSE parser uses dec.UseNumber(), which produces
json.Number values instead of float64. The getInt closure in
parseUsage only handled float64 and int, silently returning 0
for all usage fields during streaming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
